hero.subtitle: We transform culinary talent into experiences that transcend.

mission.quote: The bridge between culinary talent and sustainable success.
mission.description: We connect visionary chefs with the tools and strategies they need to thrive.

whoWeAre.description: Itibá is a culinary innovation studio and creative agency. We design and execute gastronomic experiences, strategies, and brand moments that merge heritage, sustainability, and creativity — delivering measurable results and sustainable growth.

gap.title: Today’s food & hospitality industry faces a disconnect:

points.title: Fragmented heritage
points.description: Heritage, sustainability, and authenticity remain fragmented

points.title: Soulless experiences
points.description: Multi- generational solutions in the gap of the demand of Holistic Guest Service and culturally rich food experiences

points.title: Weak storytelling
points.description: Brands & hospitality struggle to tell compelling stories through gastronomy.

pillars.title: Culinary architecture
pillars.description: Concepts with cultural roots and artistic vision.

pillars.title: Creative storytelling
pillars.description: Stories that make a brand memorable.

hero.title: An agency built from inside the industry

whoWeAre.title: Born to transform gastronomy
whoWeAre.description: Itibá connects exceptional culinary talent with the strategies and tools to achieve sustainable success. We are bridge, catalyst, and amplifier of talent that deserves to be seen.

mission.label: Mission
mission.text: Transform culinary talent into projects with identity, purpose, and sustainable legacy.

vision.label: Vision
vision.text: To be the reference agency for Latin American gastronomy in the world.

values.label: Values
values.text: Cultural authenticity, technical excellence, responsible sustainability, and innovation with roots.

theGap.title: A critical gap in the industry
points: Talented chefs lack solid business structures
Investors have no visibility into verified culinary opportunities
Gastronomic brands struggle to build authentic narratives

pillars.title: Architectural Culinary Expertise
pillars.description: Concepts with technical depth and artistic vision.

pillars.title: Creative Storytelling
pillars.description: Stories that make a culinary brand memorable.

members.name: Dayanny De La Cruz
members.title: Chef & CEO
members.description: Chef with over 15 years in international luxury gastronomy. Founder and creative voice of Itibá.
members.quote: Gastronomy is the most honest language that exists.

members.name: Noelia Caccavelli
members.title: CCO — Chief Creative Officer
members.description: Expert in brand storytelling and creative strategy for the gastronomic sector.
members.quote: Every brand has a story that deserves to be told with precision.

members.name: Oneida Franco
members.title: COO — Chief Operating Officer
members.description: Specialist in operations and financial strategy for culinary businesses.
members.quote: Sustainability is financial, operational, and human.

vision.title: Where we're headed
statements: Elevate the standard of Latin American gastronomy on a global stage
Create ecosystems where culinary talent thrives without limits
Build the future of gastronomy with purpose and excellence
